text.title: ai-enabled-business-analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ai-enabled-business-analysis as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Treating AI-extracted requirements as a complete and final requirements baseline without BA review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: NLP extraction misses implicit requirements that an experienced BA surfaces through follow-up questions. Agents accelerate drafting; they do not replace BA judgment. No agent-generated requirements document should enter the official baseline without BA review.

failure-mode.description: Agent boundary specification that only covers the happy path and defers escalation design to engineering.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Escalation design is a requirements concern, not an implementation detail. Engineering cannot define when the business requires human oversight — that is a BA and product owner decision.

failure-mode.description: Requirements extraction agents hallucinate implicit requirements that were not stated in the source document.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Every agent-extracted requirement must be traceable to a specific source passage; any requirement without a source is suspect.

failure-mode.description: Assuming all agent-generated requirements documents are complete without BA review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents accelerate drafting, they do not replace BA judgment. All outputs go to a BA for review before being written into the project's official requirements baseline.

failure-mode.description: Running sentiment analysis on stakeholder communications without disclosure.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Running NLP on employee or customer communications without appropriate consent is a data privacy risk.

failure-mode.description: Omitting agentic system specification elements: agent boundaries, decision rules, human oversight requirements, and escalation criteria.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: These are frequently missing from initial requirement drafts and create governance gaps later.
